name: Egg Allergy Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for egg allergy and related allergic reactions. Used as an exclusion or contraindication criterion in immunization measures (CIS, IMA) where egg-based vaccines (e.g., influenza, MMR) may be contraindicated in patients with severe egg allergy.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Anaphylactic reaction due to other food, initial encounter
Anaphylactic reaction due to other food, subsequent encounter
Anaphylactic reaction due to other food, sequela
Other adverse food reactions, not elsewhere classified, initial encounter
Other adverse food reactions, not elsewhere classified, subsequent encounter
Allergy status to peanuts (food allergy status reference)
Allergy status to other foods (includes egg allergy)
Other allergic and dietetic gastroenteritis and colitis
